name: J Bar & Golf Lounge
address: 3545 S Valley View Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89103
about: J Bar & Golf Lounge is an indoor golf venue equipped with eight GolfZon TwoVision+ simulators, offering a realistic golfing experience across over 250 world-famous courses. The facility features 12,000 square feet of space with high-definition sound systems and various playing modes, suitable for both skill refinement and casual play. It combines a modern sports bar and restaurant environment with amenities like a full bar, kitchen service, and entertainment options such as Keno, Video Poker, and Blackjack.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 250+ world-famous courses with realistic HD visuals and sound
Full chipping and putting capabilities for comprehensive skill practice
Self-teeing technology and multiple hitting surfaces for varied play
On-site dining and bar service with gourmet bites and crafted cocktails
Membership options for daily access to simulators

food_and_drink.notes: Gourmet bites including sushi, steaks, and Italian classics available between rounds
Full bar service with beers, crafted cocktails, and curated beverage program

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with professional-grade accuracy and full chipping/putting capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment including clubs, but personal clubs are allowed if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted; the venue offers a full bar and kitchen service with gourmet bites and cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly advertise kid-friendly features, but families are welcome to enjoy the golf experience and dining options.
